description: Petition. In Arabic script. From Yaḥyā al-Tājir. The nature of the request is not clear, nor is it clear how much is missing from the bottom. This may be a nearly complete document since he gets to the point very quickly without buttering up the addressee first.
description_he: עצומה; כתב ערבי; מיחיא אל-תאג'יר; טבע הבקשה אינו ברור; ייתכן מסמך כמעט שלם
